description: Look your glamorous best with this lino perros clutch, customised for the glam diva in you. Show off your classy style with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable.Dimensions: 14 cm x 30 cmMade of textured fabric with a fabric liningOne main compartment with a steel claspOne insert pocket inside the main compartmentDetachable chain strap for ease of carryingCareWipe surface with a damp clean cloth
